title: Probability-aware bet sizing (AFML ch.10 2N(z)-1) on calibrated meta-prob
source: GitHub repo scout (4 Haiku explorers) + quant-phd-advisor literature review, 2026-05-31. Conversation: 'search quant trading repositories'.
why: Today position selection is a fixed 0.55 probability threshold (binary in/out) — there is NO principled sizing between the calibrated meta-prob and an order. quant-phd-advisor: AFML ch.10 's sizer (z=(p-0.5)/sqrt(p(1-p)), bet=2*N(z)-1) IS 'probability-aware portfolio construction' and is the native deliverable of the meta-labeling design. Connects calibrated p -> continuous signed bet; monotonically increases exposure on high-confidence bets, directly addressing the survival book's suspected under-risking.
value_rationale: VERDICT: Adopt (clean). Lowest marginal effort — calibrated p already exists (sigmoid/Platt on frozen tail-15%) and pipeline/sizing.py already has Kelly diagnostics. Highest value-for-effort of the sizing/risk group.
scope: Map calibrated meta-prob -> signed bet via AFML ch.10 2*N(z)-1
CRITICAL: keep AFML's averaging-over-concurrent-active-bets + discretization (else sizing churns on every prob wiggle and friction eats the edge)
Depends on calibration quality — mis-calibration breaks the z-standardization
Reuse pipeline/sizing.py; call survival_book risk controls, don't duplicate
recommendation: Adopt. Wire as the C3 sizer between meta-prob and PaperBroker order. Cheap pre-check (zero new code): plot OOF per-trade PnL -> empirical_to_gaussian_ratio and the ch.10 size series; confirm sizes don't whipsaw fold-to-fold.
out_of_scope: NOT full Kelly as the live stake (see B0122 sibling C1 caveat). The raw classifier probability is not the Kelly edge distribution.

history.reason: Implemented as INFORMATIONAL-ONLY diagnostics (deliberate: no live-sizing change 5 days before live week). pipeline/sizing.py: bet_size_from_prob (2N(z)-1 on calibrated p), average_active_bets (AFML 10.4 concurrency averaging, O(n^2) guard >20k events degrades to NaN), discretize_bet, bet_sizing_diagnostics -> summary.json 'bet_sizing' block next to kelly_sizing. 11 new tests (19 total). risk-officer: PROCEED_WITH_CAVEAT, containment verified 3 ways (zero execution/ imports, zero live readers of the summary key). WIRING-TIME HARD GATES recorded in the module docstring: (1) live code must never consume the raw signed output - only a take-mask-aware wrapper that hard-floors negatives; (2) tail saturation m->1.0 at p->1 sits exactly where Platt calibration is least trustworthy - live wiring requires a fractional multiplier and/or max-size cap < 1.0, and max_size_taken cross-read vs calibration plots. Validated end-to-end on the F008 transient config: a falsified strategy gets ~0 size from the chain - the sizer is honest.
